Share.d:
📝 DESCRIPTION

Quickly save mushroom species, quantity, and location while foraging offline

App made with tasker: HribSpot taskernet.com

1. Select mushroom species

2. Select the quantity found

3. Wait until location is acquired

4. If the previously saved mushroom needs to be edited (e.g. if you found more mushrooms in same ~20ft area where you already saved the location and want to update the quantity) hold on the "Select Mushroom" title to enter into editing mode OR just save another waypoint

5. When finished foraging, click on the file icon to open the GPX file with GaiaGPS
(waypoint colors must be updated manually in GaiaGPS as it is currently impossible to import gpx files with color)
Tip: Use the GaiaGPS website to quickly and efficiently change icon colors

by VitaliyM

WebElement.Str: Open with

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<style>
html, body {    
    margin: 0;    
    padding: 0;    
    width: 100%;    
    height: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;    
    background: transparent;
    pointer-events: none;
}
.confetti {    
    position: absolute;    
    top: -60px;    
    pointer-events: none;    
    animation-name: fall;    
    animation-timing-function: linear;    
    animation-fill-mode: forwards;
}
@keyframes fall {    
    from {        
        transform: translateY(-60px) rotate(0deg);        
        opacity: 1;    
    }    
    to {        
        transform: translateY(140vh) rotate(720deg);        
        opacity: 1;    
    }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<script>
const IMAGE_PATH = "file:///storage/emulated/0/%MushroomIcon";

let intensity = 0;
let stopTimer = null;

// how fast intensity decays
const DECAY = 0.1;

// spawn loop (runs constantly)
setInterval(() => {
    if (intensity > 0) {
        // spawn more when intensity is higher
        const spawnCount = Math.floor(intensity);

        for (let i = 0; i < spawnCount; i++) {
            createConfetti();
        }

        // decay intensity over time
        intensity -= DECAY;
        if (intensity < 0) intensity = 0;
    }
}, 50);

function createConfetti() {
    const img = document.createElement("img");
    img.src = IMAGE_PATH;
    img.className = "confetti";

    const size = 20 + Math.random() * 45;
    img.style.width = size + "px";

    const maxLeft = window.innerWidth - size;
    img.style.left = Math.random() * maxLeft + "px";

    //speed of fall
    const duration = 1 + Math.random() * 1.5;
    img.style.animationDuration = duration + "s";

    document.body.appendChild(img);

    setTimeout(() => img.remove(), duration * 1000);
}
function startConfetti(amount) {
    // allow Tasker to pass a value, or fallback if none
    if (typeof amount !== "number") amount = 2;

    intensity += amount;

    // clamp max intensity
    if (intensity > 8) intensity = 8;
}
startConfetti(3);
</script>
</body>
</html>

<StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%gl_latitude 1. Latitude </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%gl_longitude 2. Lat, Lon Accuracy In meters</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%gl_altitude Altitude (meters) In meters</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%gl_altitude_above_sea_level Altitude Above Sea Level </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%gl_altitude_accuracy Altitude Accuracy In meters</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6>%gl_bearing Bearing in the range 0.0–360.0; Horizontal direction of travel of this device; not related to the device orientation</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7>%gl_bearing_accuracy Bearing Accuracy In degrees</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8>%gl_map_url Google Maps URL </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9>%gl_coordinates Latitude and Longitude </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10>%gl_satellites Satellites The number of satellites used to derive the fix. May not always be available.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11>%gl_speed Speed In meters per second</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12>%gl_speed_accuracy Speed In meters per second</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES13>%gl_time_seconds Time Time in seconds since EPOCH the location was gotten</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES13><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES14>%gl_time_adjusted_milliseconds Time Adjusted Milliseconds Result of adding the current system time with the offset between the system time and the location time</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES14><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES15>%gl_time_gnss_milliseconds Time GNSS Milliseconds Time in milliseconds since EPOCH the location was gotten synchrined to the device's location provider</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES15><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES16>%gl_time_milliseconds Time Milliseconds Time in milliseconds since EPOCH the location was gotten</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES16><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES17>%gl_time_offset_milliseconds Time Offset Milliseconds Time difference in milliseconds between the system time and the location time</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES17><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES18>%gl_time_taken_millis Time Taken Time in milliseconds that it took for Tasker to get the location</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES18></StringArray>

Action.label:
This task can be performed:

  • Directly: Like an action center, the selected items will be passed to the LINK TAP tab of the Webview Element in this project's scene.
    You can build your action logic for the selected items there.

  • Perform Task: You can call this task from a Perform Task action that will return the selected items in the %selected_items() array variable.
Check if dark mode is enabled (1 - Light mode, 2 - Dark mode)
Check system language - Supported (pt-BR, en-US, es-ES)
